error.invalidFormat: That is not a format this report can be written in.
error.invalidDate: That date is not a date. Use the picker.
error.logoUnreadable: That logo could not be read. The report carries the image inside itself, so it has to be a real image and under a megabyte.
error.renderFailed: The report could not be built. Nothing was written.
error.noBrowser: A PDF is laid out by a browser, and there is no Chrome or Chromium on this machine to do it with. Install one, or export the card as HTML and print that.
error.writeFailed: The report could not be written there. The old file, if there was one, is untouched.
error.openFailed: The report was written, but no browser would open it. Open the file yourself.
